name: roll-3d
notes: Agent few-shot sample (R-QA-006): a small but REAL 3D game -- the M6 EXIT roll-3d Context
project. A player-controlled rolling ball (input -> force), dynamic rigid bodies + a ramp on
a static floor (physics3d, broad-phased via context_spatial), an impact particle burst on
collision, a spatialized impact sound (null audio backend), and one skeletal-animated prop.
Headless-runnable and integer/fixed-point-deterministic: the runtime mirror is registered as
session scenario 'roll-3d' (src/tests/integration/games/) and smoke-gated by the
game-smoke-roll-3d ctest. Every authored file is canonical JSON (L-32).
